metadata.description: Claude Code plugin for Backlog.md — wraps the MCP server, auto-installs the CLI, ships a /backlog-migrate skill, and adds three gated hooks (SessionStart, plan-accept, git-commit).

plugins.name: backlog-md
plugins.description: Wraps Backlog.md MCP, auto-installs the CLI, adds a /backlog-migrate skill for docs migration, three gated hooks. Zero CLAUDE.md edits.
